'''鈭歞-zh-f''' ('''kadazhaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrodrill|electrodrill]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrodrill|electrodrill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-zh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kadazhaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidazhaf|thidazhaf]] || [[word:jidazhaf|jidazhaf]] || [[word:shidazhaf|shidazhaf]] || [[word:kidazhaf|kidazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudazhaf|thuthudazhaf]] || [[word:jujudazhaf|jujudazhaf]] || [[word:shushudazhaf|shushudazhaf]] || [[word:kukudazhaf|kukudazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudazhaf|thudazhaf]] || [[word:judazhaf|judazhaf]] || [[word:shudazhaf|shudazhaf]] || [[word:kudazhaf|kudazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudazhaf|thudazhaf]] || [[word:judazhaf|judazhaf]] || [[word:shudazhaf|shudazhaf]] || [[word:kudazhaf|kudazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedazhaf|thedazhaf]] || [[word:jedazhaf|jedazhaf]] || [[word:shedazhaf|shedazhaf]] || [[word:kedazhaf|kedazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodazhaf|thothodazhaf]] || [[word:jojodazhaf|jojodazhaf]] || [[word:shoshodazhaf|shoshodazhaf]] || [[word:kokodazhaf|kokodazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodazhaf|thodazhaf]] || [[word:jodazhaf|jodazhaf]] || [[word:shodazhaf|shodazhaf]] || [[word:kodazhaf|kodazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodazhaf|thodazhaf]] || [[word:jodazhaf|jodazhaf]] || [[word:shodazhaf|shodazhaf]] || [[word:kodazhaf|kodazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dazhaf|th忙dazhaf]] || [[word:j忙dazhaf|j忙dazhaf]] || [[word:sh忙dazhaf|sh忙dazhaf]] || [[word:k忙dazhaf|k忙dazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadazhaf|thathadazhaf]] || [[word:jajadazhaf|jajadazhaf]] || [[word:shashadazhaf|shashadazhaf]] || [[word:kakadazhaf|kakadazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadazhaf|thadazhaf]] || [[word:jadazhaf|jadazhaf]] || [[word:shadazhaf|shadazhaf]] || [[word:kadazhaf|kadazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadazhaf|thadazhaf]] || [[word:jadazhaf|jadazhaf]] || [[word:shadazhaf|shadazhaf]] || [[word:kadazhaf|kadazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadazhaf|shadazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadazhaf|goshadazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadazhaf|gokishadazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadazhafn眉|shadazhafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkn眉|goshadazhafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazhafn眉|gokishadazhafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadazhafsh毛|shadazhafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadazhafnksh毛|goshadazhafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadazhafsh毛|gokishadazhafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazhafro|shadazhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkro|goshadazhafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazhafro|gokishadazhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazhafmu|shadazhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkmu|goshadazhafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazhafmu|gokishadazhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadazhafsher|shadazhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadazhafnksher|goshadazhafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadazhafsher|gokishadazhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadazhafng|shadazhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkng|goshadazhafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadazhafng|gokishadazhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadazhafya|shadazhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkya|goshadazhafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadazhafya|gokishadazhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadazhafyam|shadazhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkyam|goshadazhafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadazhafyam|gokishadazhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazhafn眉sh毛|shadazhafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkn眉sh毛|goshadazhafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazhafn眉sh毛|gokishadazhafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazhafn眉ro|shadazhafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkn眉ro|goshadazhafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazhafn眉ro|gokishadazhafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazhafn眉mu|shadazhafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkn眉mu|goshadazhafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazhafn眉mu|gokishadazhafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazhafsh毛n眉|shadazhafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazhafnksh毛n眉|goshadazhafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazhafsh毛n眉|gokishadazhafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazhafsh毛ro|shadazhafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazhafnksh毛ro|goshadazhafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazhafsh毛ro|gokishadazhafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazhafsh毛mu|shadazhafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazhafnksh毛mu|goshadazhafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazhafsh毛mu|gokishadazhafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazhafron眉|shadazhafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkron眉|goshadazhafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazhafron眉|gokishadazhafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazhafrosh毛|shadazhafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkrosh毛|goshadazhafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazhafrosh毛|gokishadazhafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazhafromu|shadazhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkromu|goshadazhafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazhafromu|gokishadazhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazhafmun眉|shadazhafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkmun眉|goshadazhafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazhafmun眉|gokishadazhafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazhafmush毛|shadazhafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkmush毛|goshadazhafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazhafmush毛|gokishadazhafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazhafmuro|shadazhafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazhafnkmuro|goshadazhafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazhafmuro|gokishadazhafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
